name: The Sheet- La Sabana
recipeIngredient: 6 oz Slice filet mignon, about 1/2 to 3 inches wide
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beef between two sheets of plastic wrap and pound outward with a tenderizer until it reaches the desired thickness.
2. Fold into a package and pound again to achieve the required size.
3. Remove the top sheet of plastic wrap and replace it with wax paper. Turn the meat over and replace the bottom sheet of plastic with wax paper. Set aside until ready to use.
4. Heat a griddle and lightly grease it when very hot.
5. Remove the top layer of wax paper, sprinkle the exposed side of the meat with lime juice, salt, and pepper, and place it face down on the griddle using the wax paper as support.
6. Carefully flip the meat over with two spatulas to prevent breaking in the middle.
7. Cook for about 2 seconds, then flip again and cook for another 2 seconds.
8. Serve immediately, flat if possible, on a large plate with refried beans and fresh salsa of your choice.
The Art of Mexican Cooking From the collection of Jim Vorheis
